kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${product_name} = Woschmann Diamond Car Android SystemTouch Screen 10.1 Inch|TS30|With Fan|4GB/64GB|4th Gen|4Core|QLED Display|GPS&Bluetooth|WiFi&FM|SteeringControl|AHD Camera Included(Wireless Android Auto & Car Play)
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Switch Window
kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Woschmann Diamond Car Android SystemTouch Screen 10.1 Inch|TS30|With Fan|4GB/64GB|4th Gen|4Core|QLED Display|GPS&Bluetooth|WiFi&FM|SteeringControl|AHD Camera Included(Wireless Android Auto & Car Play)'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.arg: xpath=//div[@class="a-section a-spacing-none aok-align-center aok-relative apex-core-price-identifier"]/descendant::span[@class="a-size-large a-color-price savingPriceOverride aok-align-center reinventPriceSavingsPercentageMargin savingsPercentage apex-savings-percentage"]
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Woschmann Diamond Car Android SystemTouch Screen 10.1 Inch|TS30|With Fan|4GB/64GB|4th Gen|4Core|QLED Display|GPS&Bluetooth|WiFi&FM|SteeringControl|AHD Camera Included(Wireless Android Auto & Car Play)'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
